ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the report was added to the system */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the template used for the report */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the report was originally recorded */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary providing context about the report */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event the report is related to */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the report (e.g., justice, accountability, transitional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "template_type" TEXT /* Type of the template (e.g., document, presentation, spreadsheet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to (e.g., university, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report version */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the report */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Detailed list of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the comment relates to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_reply_to FOREIGN KEY ("reply_to") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the attachment file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the author belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., lead author, co-author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_authors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_authors_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_editors" (
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each editor */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the editor belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the editor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the editor (e.g., lead editor, reviewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("editor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_editors_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_editors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the reviewer belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the reviewer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the reviewer (e.g., peer reviewer, technical reviewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_reviewers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_reviewers_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
